title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾风格为特色。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，专注于技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，由 anomalyco 开发，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个流行的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种扩展和自定义选项。
highlights: Stable Diffusion web UI
AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: Outsourcing plus local AI will soon become more economical vs. frontier labs
content: Article URL: https://www.signalbloom.ai/posts/outsourcing-plus-localai-will-soon-become-more-economical-vs-frontier-labs/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48278610 Points: 296 # Comments: 317
summary: 文章探讨了外包结合本地AI模型在经济性上即将超越前沿实验室（如OpenAI、Google DeepMind）的趋势，指出随着开源模型性能提升和部署成本下降，企业通过外包非核心任务并本地运行AI，能以更低成本获得接近前沿水平的性能，从而改变AI行业竞争格局。
highlights: Outsourcing plus local AI will soon become more economical vs. frontier labs
开源模型性能提升和部署成本下降使本地AI更具竞争力
企业通过外包非核心任务并本地运行AI可降低总成本

title: Uber president says AI spending is getting 'harder to justify'
content: Article URL: https://www.theverge.com/transportation/937116/uber-ai-investment-hard-to-justify Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48277485 Points: 285 # Comments: 140
summary: Uber总裁表示，随着AI投资回报的不确定性增加，相关支出正变得越来越难以合理化。
highlights: Uber president says AI spending is getting 'harder to justify'
AI investment returns are becoming increasingly uncertain

title: Intent to Prototype: Embedding API
summary: Chromium 团队发布 Embedding API 的原型意图，旨在提供标准化的嵌入内容接口，并附有外部讨论链接。
highlights: Intent to Prototype: Embedding API

title: Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas
summary: 教皇利奥十四世发布通谕《Magnifica Humanitas》，内容涉及人类尊严与当代伦理议题。
highlights: Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas

title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
content: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
summary: OpenAI与巴西媒体集团Grupo Folha和Grupo UOL达成战略合作，将可信的巴西新闻内容引入ChatGPT，通过标注来源和透明化方式扩大新闻获取渠道。
highlights: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL
bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT
expanding access to news with attribution and transparency

title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
content: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
summary: OpenAI被Gartner评为2026年企业AI编码代理领导者，Codex因创新和企业级部署能力获得认可。
highlights: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents
Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment

title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
summary: 本文澄清了AI代理领域的关键术语，包括Harness（代理运行环境）、Scaffold（代理结构框架）等，并强调正确使用术语对理解和开发AI代理系统的重要性。
highlights: Harness refers to the environment in which an AI agent operates, including tools and interfaces.
Scaffold describes the structural framework that organizes an agent's components and workflows.
Getting the terms right is crucial for clear communication and effective development of AI agents.

title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
summary: 本文介绍了NVIDIA Nemotron-Labs开发的扩散语言模型，旨在实现接近光速的文本生成速度，通过创新的扩散过程替代传统自回归方法，显著提升生成效率。
highlights: 扩散语言模型可实现接近光速的文本生成
替代传统自回归方法，显著提升生成效率
NVIDIA Nemotron-Labs在Hugging Face发布相关模型
